summary: Vendor Admin RBAC testing completed. Menu Items page works correctly (RBAC fix verified). Analytics page shows error due to orders endpoint not allowing vendor role. Fixed SelectItem empty value bug in Add Item dialog.

critical.issue: Returns 403 for vendor role - Analytics page cannot fetch orders data
critical.fix_needed: Add 'vendor' to allowed roles in tenant_admin_orders.py line 239 and filter by store_id

minor.issue: Vendor dashboard shows 403 errors in console when fetching orders for dashboard stats

integration_issues.issue: Shows error toast 'Access denied. Required roles: tenant_admin, super_admin' due to orders API 403
Menu Items count shows 0 on dashboard even though items exist (likely due to orders API failure affecting stats fetch)

action_items: CRITICAL: Add 'vendor' role to GET /api/tenant-admin/orders endpoint in /app/backend/routes/tenant_admin_orders.py line 239
Add store_id filtering for vendor role in orders endpoint (similar to items/categories)
Fix dashboard stats to handle orders API failure gracefully or add vendor role to orders endpoint
critical_code_review_comments: Orders endpoint at /app/backend/routes/tenant_admin_orders.py line 239 only allows ['tenant_admin', 'super_admin'] - needs 'vendor' role added
Dashboard component likely calls orders API which fails for vendors

success_rate.frontend: 90% - Menu Items page fully working, Analytics page partially working

seed_data_creation: Created and deleted TEST_Vendor_UI_Item_12345 during UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Vendor RBAC for Menu Items is FIXED and working. Orders endpoint still needs RBAC fix for vendor role. The fix pattern is the same as items/categories - add 'vendor' to allowed_roles and filter by store_id from JWT token.

test_results.vendor_get_stores: PASS - Returns only vendor's assigned store (Test Restaurant)
test_results.vendor_get_categories: PASS - Returns categories for vendor's store
test_results.vendor_get_items: PASS - Returns items for vendor's store
test_results.vendor_create_item: PASS - Can create items for their store
test_results.vendor_isolation: PASS - Cannot see other stores' data
test_results.menu_page_ui: PASS - No Access Denied error, all CRUD operations work
test_results.analytics_page_ui: PARTIAL - Page loads but shows error toast due to orders API 403

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: SelectItem with empty value '' caused React runtime error when opening Add Item dialog
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Changed value='' to value='none' and updated onValueChange handler to convert 'none' back to empty string

rca_of_remaining_issue.root_cause: GET /api/tenant-admin/orders endpoint in tenant_admin_orders.py only allows ['tenant_admin', 'super_admin'] roles, not 'vendor'
reproduction_steps: 3. Observe error toast 'Access denied. Required roles: tenant_admin, super_admin'
rca_of_remaining_issue.mitigation: Add 'vendor' to allowed roles at line 239 and add store_id filtering similar to items endpoint
